final_prompt.prompt:
Create a documentary-style street photography image of the 恒河 morning bathing ritual in 瓦拉纳西, India.

Style/medium: needs a 纪实摄影 (documentary photography) aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: 
Subject: must include devout 信徒 bathing in the 恒河, boats in the morning mist
Scene/backdrop: must include the 恒河 ghats in 瓦拉纳西 at dawn, with morning mist over the water
Lighting/mood: needs a warm golden-hour dawn atmosphere with soft mist diffusion — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: needs a warm-toned direction with golden sunlight — exact hues and ratios are yours
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): 
Constraints: 
Avoid:
